generated_oml:
// C1: Acting Components
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor generating torque (τ_M) from input current (I_M) for the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Multi-stage gear transmission system (gearwheel → cycloidal gearbox) reducing torque (τ_G → τ_out) while transmitting rotational motion (ω) with safety cell limiting range to [-90°, 90°] and max speed of 75°/s"
]

instance SafetyCell : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical safety enclosure constraining the working range of the first vertical axis to [-90°, 90°] degrees and operational speed limit of 75°/s"
]

// C2: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary motor encoder measuring angular position of the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox measuring angular position to reduce backlash/positional uncertainty by comparing with motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time measurement of input current (I_M) to infer torque via motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring angular velocity of the motor-gearbox assembly"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityData
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque measurement device for real-time torque estimation in the gearbox system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueData
]

// C3: Data Transmitted
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

// C4: Data
instance MeasuredMotorAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of motor angular position from encoders via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of gearbox angular position from secondary encoder via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time current measurement stream (I_M) for torque inference via motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series angular velocity data stream from sensor via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time torque measurement stream from sensor for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedCoulombViscousFriction : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output from Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation model (friction torque components: τr_M, τr_G, τr_out) compared against reference values"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedStribeckFriction : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output from Stribeck friction model simulating friction behavior under varying load conditions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedLuGreFriction : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output from LuGre friction model incorporating hysteresis and stiffness variations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C5: Models
instance StructuralBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the first vertical axis as composition of Motor and Gearbox components (gearwheel + cycloidal gearbox)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance MotorGearboxBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram specifically modeling the motor-gearbox interface with detailed component relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction components for the gearbox system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction behavior with load-dependent characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model with hysteresis and stiffness variations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionTraceabilityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML-based traceability model linking sensor data to friction models for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

// C6: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming protocol for live sensor integration (I_M, output angle, torque, angular velocity) to digital shadow"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink environment for implementing and simulating Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, and LuGre friction models"
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Software Engineering standard for structural modeling (BDD, IBD) and traceability framework"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Industrial integration framework enabling digital shadow connection with Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Traceability framework explicitly linking data points to engineering/simulation models via DSRM standards"
]

// C7: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) approaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysis
]

instance ModelDrivenControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of friction models into MBSE workflows via SysML and MATLAB Simulink for simulation and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimization
]

instance UnifiedVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization platform showing live sensor streams, simulated vs. measured outputs, and friction analysis metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationSupport
]

// C8: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static/kinetic/viscous friction losses contributing up to 30% of positional inaccuracies"
]

instance ControlOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction models to improve motion accuracy during machining tasks via model-driven control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WearDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of wear or load variations via deviations between simulated and measured outputs"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous model updating during operation to adapt to wear or load changes for enhanced motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C9: Environment
instance MotionControlEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Motor, Gearbox, SafetyCell
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and dynamic**:
  - **Data Acquisition Rate**: Sensor data (I_M, angle, torque) is processed at **high frequency** (implied by live streaming via MQTT and continuous friction modeling).
  - **Model Update Frequency**: Friction models (white-box/black-box) are dynamically refined during operation to account for wear, load changes, or tooling variations.
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are aligned with physical events (e.g., robot movements) to ensure **low-latency** interactions between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **purpose-driven** and modular:
  - **Core Components**:
    - **Digital Shadow (DS)**: Passive real-time representation of the first axis (motor + gearbox) with friction models.
    - **Processing Layer**: Consumes sensor data and friction models to compute simulated outputs (e.g., ˆr_M, ˆr_G).
    - **Dashboard**: Visualizes live data (measured vs. simulated) for friction analysis.
  - **Integration with Physical System**: Linked to the **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D** controller via AAS for closed-loop control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the **operational lifecycle** of the robot:
  - **As-Operated Phase**: Emphasizes **real-time friction modeling** during machining tasks to improve motion accuracy.
  - **Continuous Improvement**: Models are updated dynamically to reflect **wear, load variations, or tooling changes** during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Comparison of simulated vs. measured outputs (e.g., ˆr_out vs. r_out) to validate friction models.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Use of **two encoders** (motor + gearbox) to reduce positional uncertainty and backlash.
  - **Model Traceability**: Explicit association of data points to models (engineering/simulation) via the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Real-time data streaming from sensors (I_M, angle, torque) to the digital shadow.
  - **SysML Models**: Structural and behavioral modeling via **Block Definition Diagrams (BDD)** and **Internal Block Diagrams (IBD)**.
  - **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D**: Integration with the CNC controller for closed-loop control and friction-aware motion."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **SysML**: For structural and behavioral modeling.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: For traceability and data aggregation.
  - **MQTT**: For real-time data communication."
]
